purpose: Define the L2 and L3 standalone replacement readiness proof matrix so standalone claims require artifact-level evidence, not symbol-count evidence alone.

readiness_levels.name: Partial standalone replacement
readiness_levels.allowed_claim_when: A declared standalone subset has direct-link evidence, no unapproved host-glibc dependency, current versioned-symbol proof, real-program subset smoke, and budgeted strict/hardened behavior.
readiness_levels.blocked_reason: Current replacement_levels.json keeps current_level and release_tag_policy.current_release_level at L0; L2 host-dependency, direct-link, and standalone subset evidence is not complete.

readiness_levels.name: Full standalone replacement
readiness_levels.allowed_claim_when: The full libc artifact boots without host glibc, owns CRT/rtld/TLS/init/fini/secure-mode obligations, has native NSS/resolver/locale/iconv/stdio/pthread coverage, and passes full real-program workload, diagnostics, and performance gates.
readiness_levels.blocked_reason: Current replacement_levels.json marks L3 as roadmap and explicitly lists CRT, rtld, NSS, resolver, and system-libc deployment evidence blockers.

obligations.title: Declared standalone subset and artifact profile
obligations.requirement: Declare the exact symbol families, artifact name, feature flags, loader assumptions, TLS assumptions, secure-mode assumptions, and unsupported exclusions for the L2 subset.
obligations.blocker_reason: No current machine-checked standalone subset manifest is tied to replacement_levels.json.
unit_tests_required: subset manifest parser rejects missing symbol families
subset manifest parser rejects missing loader/TLS/secure-mode assumptions
e2e_or_smoke_required: direct-link subset smoke with strict and hardened mode metadata

negative_claim_tests.unsupported_condition: L2 claim lacks a current standalone subset manifest

obligations.title: Versioned symbol subset export proof
obligations.requirement: Prove every L2 subset symbol has the expected exported name, version node, calling convention, and fixture-backed semantic status.
obligations.blocker_reason: Current symbol counts do not prove subset version-node compatibility or semantic fixture coverage.
unit_tests_required: ABI map test proves every subset symbol has the expected version node
fixture coverage test rejects symbols advertised without semantic evidence
e2e_or_smoke_required: direct-link C fixture resolves all subset symbols without missing-symbol diagnostics

negative_claim_tests.unsupported_condition: implemented/raw-syscall count is high but versioned subset evidence is absent

obligations.title: L2 host dependency allowlist and runtime audit
obligations.requirement: Inventory every host libc, loader, CRT, startup, and dlsym/dlopen dependency reachable from the L2 artifact and block unapproved dependencies.
obligations.blocker_reason: Host-dependency inventory is not yet a current release gate for standalone claims.
unit_tests_required: dependency inventory parser rejects unapproved libc symbol dependencies
dependency inventory parser rejects stale source_commit evidence
e2e_or_smoke_required: ldd/readelf/nm-style deterministic audit for release artifact

negative_claim_tests.unsupported_condition: L2 artifact still reaches an unapproved host glibc dependency

obligations.title: Direct-link C and real-program subset smoke
obligations.requirement: Run direct-link C fixtures and at least one representative real-program subset smoke without relying on LD_PRELOAD-only interpose behavior.
obligations.blocker_reason: Current green smoke evidence is interpose-oriented and cannot by itself promote L2.
unit_tests_required: direct-link fixture runner rejects missing stdout/stderr/status artifacts
mode-pair runner rejects incomplete strict/hardened pairs
e2e_or_smoke_required: real-program subset smoke with structured log bundle

obligations.title: Strict/hardened mode and performance budget proof
obligations.requirement: Prove L2 subset behavior in strict and hardened modes and enforce strict/hardened latency budgets for subset hot paths.
obligations.blocker_reason: Performance budgets and standalone subset behavior are not yet coupled to an L2 release gate.
unit_tests_required: strict and hardened decision tests for every optimized subset family
regression tests for boundary and adversarial optimized inputs
e2e_or_smoke_required: budgeted subset benchmark replay with hardware metadata

negative_claim_tests.unsupported_condition: subset passes correctness checks but lacks current budget evidence

obligations.title: L2 diagnostics and claim-control gate
obligations.requirement: Failures must include structured logs, failure signatures, artifact references, and a claim-control rule that blocks stale or missing L2 evidence.
obligations.blocker_reason: L2 diagnostics exist as planned requirements but are not yet an enforced release-promotion gate.
unit_tests_required: claim gate rejects stale evidence
log schema test rejects missing failure_signature or artifact_refs
e2e_or_smoke_required: intentional missing-evidence replay that emits claim_blocked

negative_claim_tests.unsupported_condition: L2 failure lacks artifact refs or failure signature

obligations.title: Custom CRT, startup, TLS, init/fini, and secure-mode ownership
obligations.requirement: Own process entry, CRT objects, TLS model, init/fini ordering, auxv/env handling, and secure-mode behavior without host glibc startup.
obligations.blocker_reason: replacement_levels.json lists CRT bootstrap as not started for L3.
unit_tests_required: startup parser tests for argv/envp/auxv
TLS model tests for thread-local errno and runtime mode
secure-mode tests reject unsafe env-driven behavior
e2e_or_smoke_required: direct exec standalone binary reaches main and exits with expected status

obligations.title: rtld, symbol lookup, relocation, IFUNC, and namespace proof
obligations.requirement: Provide a minimal loader path or explicitly proved replacement mechanism for dynamic loading, symbol resolution, relocation, IFUNC, and namespace behavior.
obligations.blocker_reason: replacement_levels.json lists rtld as not started for L3.
unit_tests_required: versioned symbol export tests
relocation and IFUNC fixture tests
namespace isolation tests for dlfcn behavior
e2e_or_smoke_required: standalone dynamic-loading smoke with deterministic shared objects

obligations.title: Zero host-glibc dependency proof
obligations.requirement: Prove the full replacement artifact has no host glibc dependency in build metadata, dynamic dependencies, runtime symbol resolution, or fallback paths.
obligations.blocker_reason: The current artifact is explicitly interpose-first and host glibc remains part of the deployment story.
unit_tests_required: host dependency inventory rejects libc.so.6 and host pthread/stdio fallback
host symbol resolver audit rejects replacement profile fallback
e2e_or_smoke_required: readelf/ldd/nm audit plus runtime trace proving no host glibc dependency

negative_claim_tests.unsupported_condition: any host glibc dependency remains reachable

obligations.title: Syscall and architecture obligation matrix
obligations.requirement: Bind every raw syscall, ABI layout, time64 behavior, errno mapping, signal frame, futex path, and architecture-specific assumption to tests and documented support targets.
obligations.blocker_reason: No full L3 architecture/syscall proof matrix is current.
unit_tests_required: errno mapping boundary tests
time64 and ABI layout tests
signal and futex architecture tests
e2e_or_smoke_required: architecture-tagged standalone syscall smoke with structured logs

negative_claim_tests.unsupported_condition: architecture or syscall obligation lacks evidence

obligations.title: Native NSS, resolver, locale, iconv, stdio, and pthread ownership
obligations.requirement: Implement and prove native hard-parts behavior for NSS, resolver, locale/iconv/wcsmbs, stdio/libio FILE ownership, and pthread/futex behavior without host fallbacks.
obligations.blocker_reason: replacement_levels.json lists NSS and resolver as not started for L3, and full native hard-parts evidence is not complete.
unit_tests_required: NSS passwd/group positive and missing-record tests
resolver UDP timeout and hosts-file tests
locale/iconv conversion and collation tests
stdio FILE state tests
pthread futex synchronization and cancellation tests
e2e_or_smoke_required: strict and hardened hard-parts mode-pair replay

negative_claim_tests.unsupported_condition: any hard-parts family lacks native fixture and e2e evidence

obligations.title: Full real-program workload, performance, diagnostics, and release gate
obligations.requirement: Pass the full user workload matrix as a standalone artifact, enforce performance budgets, emit structured diagnostics, and block README/release claims unless all L3 evidence is current.
obligations.blocker_reason: Current user workload and release gates are planning/interpose gates, not standalone L3 promotion evidence.
unit_tests_required: release gate rejects stale L3 artifacts
claim reconciliation rejects README/release standalone overclaims
structured log tests reject missing diagnostic fields
e2e_or_smoke_required: performance budget replay for hot paths
intentional failure replay with actionable diagnostics

negative_claim_tests.unsupported_condition: README or release tag claims L3 while any proof obligation is blocked
negative_claim_tests.advertised_claim_blocked: L3 release tag or README standalone claim
